title: 随着陆军人数下降，韩国探索使用现代机器人
summary: South Korea’s military is exploring a strategic partnership with Hyundai Motor Co. to potentially deploy robotics to the front lines as Seoul accelerates investment in AI-powered, unmanned systems to tackle a deepening troop shortage.（原题：South Korea Exploring Using Hyundai Robots as Army Numbers Fall）
